extortion.description: The Veethree Group is an alliance of companies, driven by common technologies and innovation. Today the group of companies has employees worldwide, with sites over 4 continents, serving 100’s of OEM customers.Those companies include:    Indication Instruments Ltd – India    Veethree New Zealand – New Zealand    Veethree North America LLC – USA    Veethree Electronics & Marine LLC – USA    Veethree Technologies (CANtronik Ltd) – UK
